mapper.insert: INSERT INTO block_checkpoint ( contract_address, last_processed_block, last_processed_block_hash, last_processed_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{contractAddress}, #{lastProcessedBlock}, #{lastProcessedBlockHash}, #{lastProcessedAt}, #{updatedAt} )

INSERT INTO block_checkpoint ( contract_address, last_processed_block, last_processed_block_hash, last_processed_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{contractAddress}, #{lastProcessedBlock}, #{lastProcessedBlockHash}, #{lastProcessedAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON CONFLICT (contract_address) DO UPDATE SET last_processed_block = EXCLUDED.last_processed_block, last_processed_block_hash = EXCLUDED.last_processed_block_hash, last_processed_at = EXCLUDED.last_processed_at, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at
